name: Fudge Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the sugar, Cream of Wheat, cocoa, and flour.
2. Blend in the egg product, melted margarine, and vanilla until well combined.
3. Spread the mixture evenly in a greased 8x8x2-inch baking pan.
4. Bake at 325°F for 25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out almost clean.
5. Allow the brownies to cool completely in the pan on a wire rack.
6. Cut into 2-inch squares.
